_provenance.description: Complete club/squadron directory obtained by replaying the find-a-club search (Joomla com_mymaplocations) that the americasboatingclub.org page itself performs, across overlapping circles that blanket all US states, territories and overseas locations.
_provenance.strategy: oversized-radius circles (server honors radius 3000 mi beyond the UI's 500 mi cap)
